zh.Holway, Somerset, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特霍爾瓦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Holway於大約1354年出生在英國薩默塞特霍爾瓦時，她的父親Robert de Holway II28歲，母親Margaret of Devonshire25歲。她於1374年與John Cary在英國薩默塞特霍爾瓦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1395年在英國戴文享年43歲。

zh-hans.Holway, Somerset, England, United Kingdo: 英国英格兰薩默塞特霍爾瓦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Holway于大约1354年出生在英国薩默塞特霍爾瓦时，她的父亲Robert de Holway II28岁，母亲Margaret of Devonshire25岁。她于1374年与John Cary在英国薩默塞特霍爾瓦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1395年在英国戴文享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donal, Patrick James.
English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Holloway  , perhaps specifically from Holway in Somerset.

variants.name: Holloway
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) sunken road’, from Middle English hol(g)h ‘hollow’ + weie ‘way, road’ (Old English holh + weg), or else a habitational name from any of numerous places so named, such as Holloway (Middlesex) or Holway (Somerset). In Ireland (Leinster), the name has sometimes been Gaelicized as Ó hAilmhic (see Hulvey ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Holway was born about 1354, in Holway, Somerset, England, her father, Robert de Holway II, was 28 and her mother, Margaret of Devonshire, was 25. She married John Cary in 1374, in Holway, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died about 1395, in Devon, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Holway est née environ 1354, à Holway, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Holway II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Devonshire, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Cary en 1374, à Holway, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1395, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Holway um 1354 in Holway, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Holway II 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret of Devonshire 25. Sie hat 1374 in Holway, Somerset, England John Cary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb um 1395 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Holway è nata il circa 1354 nel Holway, Somerset, England, sua padre, Robert de Holway II, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret of Devonshire, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Cary nel 1374, nel Holway, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1395, nel Devon, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Holwayが約1354年にイギリスソメルセトホールワイで生まれた時，父Robert de Holway IIは28歳，母Margaret of Devonshireは25歳であった。1374年にイギリスソメルセトホールワイでJohn Caryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1395年にイギリスデボンで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Holway(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 서머세트 홀웨이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Holway II(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret of Devonshire(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 서머세트 홀웨이에서 John Cary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1395년 영국 데폰에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Holway nasceu aproximadamente 1354, em Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Holway II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Devonshire, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Cary em 1374, em Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1395, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Holway родилась около 1354 г. в местности холвеи, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Holway II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Devonshire, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cary в 1374 г. в местности холвеи, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла около 1395 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Holway nació aproximadamente 1354, en Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Holway II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret of Devonshire, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Cary en 1374, en Holway, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1395, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
